_doc: Token-level synonym verdicts (SEED-PIPELINE-DESIGN.md §4.8, Approach A). A solo promoted meaning whose English TOKENS (comma/semicolon pieces, not just the first) are produced by another Swedish word never groups under first-token identity (normTr). This file is the human ruling on each such collision, surfaced by `pnpm seed:detect-token-synonyms`. `merges`: extra concepts handed to the gloss/sense pass (layer 50) so genuine synonyms group — the gloss-curator then partitions each into senses. `keepSeparate`: collisions ruled different-sense/too-marginal, left solo; recorded so the standing guard doesn't re-flag them. Edit here, then re-run the gloss pass over the affected concepts (batch-token-synonyms → gloss-curator → seed:build).

merges.note: förhållande#1 'relationship' ↔ relation 'relation, relationship' — same sense (a social/romantic relationship).
stryka#1 'cross out, delete' ↔ radera 'delete, erase' — same sense (delete text).
väsen#1 'being, creature' ↔ varelse 'creature, being' — same sense (a living being).
pris#1 'prize' ↔ premie 'premium, prize' — overlap on prize/reward (curator may keep premie's 'premium' distinct).
panna#1 'pan, pot' ↔ kastrull 'saucepan, pot, pan' — same sense (cookware); near-synonyms (frying pan vs saucepan).
sno#1 'nick, steal' (informal) ↔ stjäla 'steal' — same sense (take what isn't yours).

anmäla#1 'sign up, register' ↔ registrera 'register' (verb) — same sense; reconstitutes the existing 'register' concept so registrera and anmäla share the verb sense while the noun register (3200, an index/directory) stays its own sense.

keepSeparate.note: laga#1 'cook, prepare' (verb) shares 'cook' with kock 'chef, cook' (a cook, noun) and 'prepare' with bereda/förbereda — different sense/POS.
fond#1 'broth, stock' (cooking) shares 'stock' with aktie (financial), bestånd/upplag (inventory) — different sense.
regel#1 'bolt, bar' shares 'bar' with bar (pub/counter) and stång (rod) — different sense.
klipp#1 'bargain, good deal' (a bargain, noun) shares 'bargain' with förhandla 'negotiate, bargain' (to bargain, verb) — different sense/POS.
skuld#1 'guilt, blame' (noun) shares 'blame' with skylla 'blame' (to blame, verb) — different POS.
rock#1 'rock, rock and roll' (music) shares 'rock' with klippa 'cliff, rock' (stone) — different sense.
back#2 'crate' (a bottle crate) shares 'crate' with box 'box, crate' — near but distinct objects; box is C1 rare, low value; keep separate (over-merging teaches a false synonym).

golf#1 'gulf' shares 'gulf' with bukt 'bay, gulf' — plausible but marginal (golf is chiefly the sport); keep separate to avoid reconstituting the clean 'bay, inlet, creek' concept for a niche B2 sense.

uppgång#1 'staircase, entrance' is a conflated phrase spanning two sense-families (staircase → trappa; entrance → ingång/entré) — a slot can carry only one grouping key, so keep the self-describing prompt solo.
